reviews.comment:
Lugar estratégico de barracas,  a cuadras de constitución y San Telmo. De noche el servicio es rápido, durante el día se forman filas de coches, tardan mucho en atender los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
A strategic location for the bus stop, a few blocks from Constitución and San Telmo. At night the service is fast, but during the day lines of cars form and the attendants take a long time to serve you.
